message:
feat(fs): use spawn_blocking_io for async file operations

Wrap std::fs::File in Arc to allow sharing across spawn_blocking_io
boundaries. Update File::open, create, sync_all, sync_data, set_len,
metadata, try_clone, set_permissions to use spawn_blocking_io for
truly non-blocking filesystem I/O.

Also update OpenOptions::open to use spawn_blocking_io.

Poll-based traits (AsyncRead, AsyncWrite, AsyncSeek) still use direct
blocking I/O as they require reactor integration for true async support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
